_comment: vmlx (MLX Studio bundled Python) serving the censored JANGTQ model (OsaurusAI/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-JANGTQ4). Speaks OpenAI + Anthropic + Ollama API natively. No API key required. For uncensored JANGTQ CRACK variants (dealignai MiniMax-M2.7 / Qwen3.6 JANGTQ4-CRACK / JANGTQ2-CRACK) use the matching templates under docs/models/uncen-model/client-configs/vmlx/.
